text:
Services — Audiology services 
071 = Extended services for pregnant women — Additional Pregnancy-related and postpartum 
services for a 60-day period after the pregnancy ends and any remaining days in the month in 
which the 60th day falls. 
072 = Home and Community Care for Functionally Disabled Elderly individuals as defined and 
described in the State Plan 
073 = Emergency services for certain legalized aliens and undocumented aliens 
074 = Licensed or Otherwise State-Approved Free-Standing
